title: Smuggling Risk/Reward
description: In early game, smuggling is beneficial given high prices and low risk of being caught. Prohibited goods command premium prices. Risk is low with small operations but inflates with scale. High-risk, high-reward decision making.
definition-of-done: Smuggling action available for prohibited goods. Price premium for smuggled goods. Detection risk scales with volume. Risk/reward visible before smuggling.
testing-plan: Verify smuggling action works. Test price premiums. Verify risk scaling with volume. Test risk/reward display.
